name: Rusty knife
description: A dull, pitted blade with a cracked wooden handle. Better than bare fists, barely.

name: Stinger
description: A hefty electrical prod shaped like a bee's stinger. Crackles with barely contained voltage. Standard issue for the bee guards.

name: Colt 45
description: A battered but functional revolver. Six shots, if you can find the ammo.

name: AK-47
description: A scratched-up assault rifle of indeterminate origin. Reliable as gravity.

name: Restraint arm
description: A hydraulic clamp arm designed for patient restraint. Crushes with mechanical indifference.

name: Leather vest
description: A stiff leather vest, sun-cracked but still good for stopping a blade.

name: Hard hat
description: A scuffed yellow hard hat. Protects against falling debris and feral tusks alike.

name: Work boots
description: Heavy steel-toed boots, well worn but solid.

name: Pickle jar
description: A sealed mason jar of dill pickles. Surprisingly refreshing in the desert heat.

name: Cucumber
description: A fresh cucumber. Where it came from in this desert is anyone's guess.

name: Pineapple
description: A small, fierce tropical pineapple. More sour than sweet. The leaves could cut you.

name: Boar tusks
description: Yellowed tusks chipped from rooting through volcanic rock. They gore with animal conviction.

name: Shadow touch
description: Not a weapon so much as a contact. Where the shadow grazes you, warmth leaves.

name: Shadow slam
description: The full weight of something that shouldn't have weight. The impact feels like being forgotten.

name: Coconut
description: A green coconut, heavy with water. You could drink it or throw it.

name: Mango
description: A ripe mango, soft and fragrant. Juice runs down your wrist the moment you touch it.

name: Beer
description: A can of cheap lager, lukewarm. The label is in a language you don't recognize.

name: Rum
description: A pour of dark rum in a heavy glass. It smells like burnt sugar and bad decisions.

name: Island cocktail
description: Something pink with a paper umbrella. It tastes like sunscreen and pineapple. It's perfect.

name: Boat tour ticket
description: A laminated ticket for a 'Sunset Lagoon Experience' boat tour. The departure time is listed as 'TBD.' The fine print says no refunds.

name: Machete
description: A broad-bladed machete with a wooden handle wrapped in electrical tape. Good for jungle and for trouble.

name: Straw hat
description: A wide-brimmed straw hat. Keeps the sun off and a boar tusk out of your skull, barely.

name: Canvas vest
description: A heavy canvas vest with brass snaps. Tourist gear, but it'll stop a graze.

name: Blizzard
description: A Dairy Queen Blizzard, served upside-down per company policy. Cookie dough. It's already melting.

name: Hamburger
description: A Dairy Queen hamburger in a foil wrapper. The cheese has fused with the bun. It's delicious.

name: Dilly Bar
description: A chocolate-dipped ice cream bar on a stick. The coating cracks when you bite it. An American classic.

name: Canvas jacket
description: A forest-green canvas jacket with a Generous Mart bear patch on the breast. Stiff but warm. Surprisingly tough.

name: Flashlight
description: A heavy-duty rubber flashlight, the kind that doubles as a club. Batteries included.

name: Dollar
description: A crumpled greenback. Still spends.
